prompt_template:
Translate the following YAML text from '{source_lang}' to '{target_lang}'.
Rules:
1. Only translate text after ': ' in double quotes.
2. Do NOT translate $variables$, [brackets], §X color codes, or file paths.
3. Preserve all \n and leading whitespace.
4. Keep lines like 'l_english:' or comments (#) unchanged.
5. Output EXACTLY one line per input line.
6. Do NOT wrap in code blocks or add explanations.

{batch_text}
